meta.purpose: Capability stages, practice loops, and measurable indicators.
meta.load_condition: Load for learning, team standards, audits, or progressive quality improvement.

stages.name: Prompt-to-output
indicators: agent generates working animation from a prompt

stages.name: Brief-and-review pipeline
indicators: agent always produces a brief before code
assumptions are explicitly stated and reviewed
human review gates are enforced before expansion
revision deltas are logged and traceable

stages.name: Taste-calibrated automation
indicators: agent internalizes brand motion grammar after 3-5 review cycles
brief template is brand-specific and reuseable
quality signals are captured per revision and improve agent output over time
human review shifts from direction to approval only

evolution_layers.name: Prompt-to-output → Brief-and-review pipeline
evolution_layers.capability: Progress from Prompt-to-output to Brief-and-review pipeline

evolution_layers.name: Brief-and-review pipeline → Taste-calibrated automation
evolution_layers.capability: Progress from Brief-and-review pipeline to Taste-calibrated automation

measurement.how: Track brief_approval_rate over iterations of the practice loop.
Track assumptions_per_generation over iterations of the practice loop.
Track review_cycles_to_approval over iterations of the practice loop.
Track revision_delta_clarity_score over iterations of the practice loop.
Track human_review_time_per_animation over iterations of the practice loop.
Track agent_quality_drift_over_sessions over iterations of the practice loop.
